overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a large-scale abstract sculpture installation featuring a giant hammer monument and geometric concrete forms under bright daylight. The character walks through open plazas and narrow corridors between the massive architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza with abstract sculpture installation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the giant hammer sculpture installation

entered.detail: massive hammer-shaped monument with long horizontal handle extending across the sky
large geometric concrete blocks scattered around the plaza
tall angular concrete structures with weathered grey surfaces
flat grey concrete ground with subtle geometric patterns and shadows

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a wide open concrete plaza dominated by a massive hammer sculpture in the distance. Large abstract concrete forms flank the sides, and the bright midday sun casts sharp shadows across the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: sculpture garden with massive hammer monument

events.description: character pauses briefly to look up at the hammer sculpture before continuing to circle around it

agents.ego_description: circling around the hammer sculpture to view it from different angles, moving from the right side toward the left

entered.detail: reddish-brown oxidized metal geometric blocks situated near the hammer base

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the massive hammer sculpture, revealing rusted metal blocks at its base. The camera moves from viewing the hammer on the right to having it pass behind on the left, with the sun creating lens flare when looking upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area between large geometric stone forms

events.description: character enters narrow corridor between tall concrete walls, shifting from open plaza to enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking away from the hammer sculpture toward and into narrower passages between the installation walls

entered.detail: high vertical concrete walls forming a narrow corridor entrance
tall grey concrete wall with weathered texture and angular top

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the hammer monument, the character approaches and enters a narrow corridor formed by tall concrete walls. The space transitions from wide open plaza to a more confined passage between the geometric structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between tall concrete installation walls

agents.ego_description: exploring the maze-like narrow corridors between high concrete walls, moving deeper into the installation structure

entered.detail: large rusted metal surface with orange-brown oxidation visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the enclosed narrow corridors between towering concrete walls, with only a strip of sky visible above. A rusted metal wall appears in the distance as the character explores deeper into the maze-like structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sun-drenched plaza into a confined, maze-like network of concrete corridors. It begins with the character walking across an open concrete expanse toward a massive hammer sculpture, with bright midday sun casting sharp shadows across the ground. As the character circles the monument, the camera reveals rusted metal blocks at its base and captures a brief lens flare before the hammer passes behind to the left. The scene then shifts as the character moves away from the open plaza and enters a narrow passage formed by towering geometric walls. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, leaving only a thin strip of sky visible above as the character ventures deeper toward a distant rusted metal wall.
